metadata.name: OSH Park (2-layer)
metadata.process_notes: Standard-process defaults for OSH Park's 2-layer prototype service (process tier: 2-layer, 1oz copper, 1.6 mm ENIG). Numbers are published standard-process minimums (min trace/space 6 mil / 0.152 mm, min drill 10 mil / 0.254 mm, min annular ring 4 mil / 0.1016 mm) and MUST be confirmed against OSH Park's current design rules before relied upon. high_speed_si checks are disabled because the fixed-stackup 2-layer service does not offer a controlled-impedance option.
